text:
• Dynamic Rate Limiting Ingress Policy - Complete Analysis
MongoDB Parameters Modified
The policy controls 4 server parameters:
Parameter
ingressRequestRateL imiterEnabled
Type
bool
Description
Enables/disables the rate limiter
ingressRequestAdmissionRatePerSec
i32
Request admission rate (ops/sec)
ingressRequestAdmissionBurstCapacitySecs
ingressRequestRateL imiterApplicationExemptions
f64
Document
Burst capacity window (seconds)
Apps exempt from limiting
Default exemptions: OplogFetcher, MongoDB Internal Client, NetworkInterfaceTL-Repl, MongoDB Automation Agent, mongotune, mongot, ReplCoordExtern
Signals Monitored
CPU/Latency signals:
Signal
Default Threshold
CPU Pressure
80%
serverStatus Command Latency
500ms
Read Dwell Time (per-ticket)
Read Dwell Time (rate)
20,000us
300 ops/sec
Write Dwell Time (per-ticket)
Write Dwell Time (rate)
20,000us
300 ops/sec
Memory signals:
Signal
Available Memory
OOM Score
Page Fault Rate
Memory Pressure (Linux)
Default Threshold
1024 MB
1200
50,000 faults/sec
50 per-mill
Decision Rules
Overload Detection
Overload is declared when all samples in history (default: 10 samples) exceed thresholds for:
- (CPU overload AND Dwell time overload) OR
- Memory overload (2-of-3 rule: available memory, memory forecast, OOM score)
Rate Adjustment Algorithms
1. p-Controller (Proportional Control)
10910 ratio = 10910| (current dwell + 1) / (target dwell + 1))
rate_change = gain × log10_ratio
(capped at 25% of current rate)
new_rate = current_rate - rate_change
- Minimum rate:
5% of initial rate
- Max change per tick: 25%
2. AIMD (Additive Increase / Multiplicative Decrease)
If dwell > target:
new rate = current rate x decrease factor
If dwell < target:
new_rate = current_rate + increase_step
If dwell == target: no change
3. Fixed Rate - Static rate, no adaptation
Policy Flow (each tick, default 1s)
1. POLL:
Sample CPU pressure
— Sample memory signals (Linux)
- Execute serverStatus (max 400ms timeout)
Extract dwell times & admission stats
- Add to rolling history (10 samples)
Determine: overload detected?
2. TUNE:
- If overload:
- Calculate new rate via algorithm
- Set ingressRequest mission urs capacitysec
• Enable limiter
Record overload timestamp
If currently limiting but no overload:
- Check hold duration elapsed?
If no: continue tuning, extend hold if rate decreases
If yes: disable limiter, reset state
Configuration Options
tick_interval_ms: 1000
# Evaluation interval
server_status_timeout_ms: 400
# serverStatus timeout
forecast_interval_ms: 5000
# Memory trend window
hold_ duration_secs: 0
# Keep limiting after overload clears
signals_history_capacity: 10
# Samples before declaring overload
dry_run: false
# Test mode (no actual changes)
active signals: All|Cou|Memory
# Which signal groups to use
Requirements: MongoDB 8.2+ FCV, not a sharded cluster (mongos not supported, replicaset/standalone only).
